description: Recurring Paperclip routines for AI Ready U: Life. 19 routines across daily, weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, quarterly, and annual cadences.

routines.title: Daily Brief
routines.description:
Chief of Staff compiles and emails the daily brief to the user.

1. Scan all 14 agent state files
2. Scan all 14 vault state files
3. Check open Paperclip issues for progress/blockers
4. Create new tasks for agents with pending work
5. Compile daily brief email and send via gmail skill
6. Update chief-of-staff state.md

routines.title: Weekly Life Dashboard
routines.description: Chief of Staff produces the comprehensive weekly dashboard covering all 14 domains, goal progress, upcoming deadlines, blockers, and recommendations. Email to user.

routines.title: Bi-weekly Vault Triage
routines.description: Chief of Staff scans the intake folder and routes unprocessed files using port and documents skills. Creates subtasks for each agent whose vault received new files.

triggers.cronHuman: 1st and 15th of every month at 10:00 AM

routines.title: Weekly Wealth Review
routines.description: Wealth agent reviews account balances, recent transactions, budget adherence, investment performance, and credit health. Flag anomalies. Update vault state.

routines.title: Weekly Career Review
routines.description: Career agent reviews professional progress, networking follow-ups, certification deadlines, and content pipeline. Update state files.

routines.title: Weekly Business Ops Check
routines.description: Business agent reviews entity compliance, rental properties, contracts, and P&L. Update state files.

routines.title: Weekly Mind & Goals Review
routines.description: Mind agent reviews journal practice, goals progress, relationships, and mental wellness. Surface patterns. Update state files.

routines.title: Weekly Home Check
routines.description: Home agent reviews maintenance schedule, supplies, utility data, and household systems. Update state files.

routines.title: Weekly Health Check-in
routines.description: Health agent reviews upcoming appointments, medication adherence, overdue screenings, and vitals trends. Update state files.

routines.title: Weekly Family Check-in
routines.description: Family agent reviews family calendar, care needs, children's events, and shared responsibilities. Update state files.

routines.title: Bi-weekly Tax Review
routines.description: Tax agent reviews income changes, deductions, and upcoming deadlines. Runs weekly during tax season (Jan-Apr).

triggers.cronHuman: 1st and 15th of every month at 9:00 AM

routines.title: Bi-weekly Insurance Monitor
routines.description: Insurance agent reviews policy renewals, coverage gaps, and premium changes. Flag policies expiring within 60 days.

triggers.cronHuman: 1st and 15th of every month at 10:00 AM

routines.title: Bi-weekly Learning Progress
routines.description: Learning agent reviews course progress, reading log, certification deadlines, and skill development. Update state files.

triggers.cronHuman: 1st and 15th of every month at 9:00 AM

routines.title: Bi-weekly Vehicles Check
routines.description: Vehicles agent reviews maintenance schedule, registration expirations, warranty status, and recall notices. Update state files.

triggers.cronHuman: 1st and 15th of every month at 10:00 AM

routines.title: Monthly Legal Review
routines.description: Legal agent reviews identity document expirations, estate plan currency, beneficiary designations, contract renewals, and compliance deadlines.

triggers.cronHuman: First day of every month at 9:00 AM

routines.title: Monthly Estate Review
routines.description: Estate agent reviews property values, mortgage statements, property tax status, and HOA compliance. Coordinate with home agent on maintenance.

triggers.cronHuman: First day of every month at 9:00 AM

routines.title: Monthly Explore Planning
routines.description: Explore agent reviews upcoming trips, events, hobby activities, and loyalty program balances. Plan activities for the month.

triggers.cronHuman: First day of every month at 10:00 AM

routines.title: Quarterly Goal Review
routines.description: Chief of Staff reviews OKR progress, archives completed goals, proposes new quarterly OKRs, and creates issue cascades for domain agents. Email quarterly summary to user.

triggers.cronHuman: Start of each quarter (Jan 1, Apr 1, Jul 1, Oct 1) at 9:00 AM

routines.title: Annual Life Review
routines.description: Chief of Staff conducts comprehensive annual review across all 14 domains. Year-over-year comparison, goal achievement assessment, archive 00_current to 01_prior, propose annual goals.
